states.label: Ready
states.summary: All probes are current and the service is honouring its contract.

states.label: Degraded
states.summary: Service is functioning but at reduced capacity (slow, partial features, retries firing).

states.label: Local-only
states.summary: Service is unreachable but a local fallback keeps the workflow usable.

states.label: Stale
states.summary: Cached data is being served because the last fresh probe is past its review window.

states.label: Contract mismatch
states.summary: The remote side responded with a payload outside the agreed contract; results are held until the contract clears.

states.label: Policy blocked
states.summary: Policy or governance is blocking the service (admin disabled, region gate, license).

states.label: Unavailable
states.summary: Service is unreachable and there is no admissible local fallback.
